description_long: This is a large, ornate book with a thick, cream-colored cover adorned with metallic gold accents and turquoise inlays. The cover features geometric panels of a marbled teal material, bordered by gold and cream, giving it a luxurious and mystical appearance. Two gold clasps and several turquoise studs are visible on the cover, suggesting a secure and decorative binding. The book's pages are thick and numerous, with visible layering along the sides. The spine is rounded and reinforced, with additional turquoise embellishments and gold corner plates. The overall design suggests a fantasy or magical tome, possibly used for ceremonial or scholarly purposes.
description: A large, ornate book with a cream and gold cover, teal marbled panels, and turquoise embellishments. It features gold clasps and a reinforced, decorated spine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick cream cover, gold corner plates, and turquoise studs, with the layered pages clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the marbled teal cover, gold clasps, and symmetrical turquoise inlays, with the book's width fully visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other edge of the book and the continuation of the decorative elements.
description_view_3: Spine view displaying the rounded, reinforced spine with turquoise studs and gold plates, and the marbled teal panel running along the spine.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is rounded and covered in cream material with turquoise studs and gold plates, matching the decorative style of the cover. No text or patterns are visible.
